landing.hero.subtitle: AI-powered conversation practice that builds real language confidence. Designed for students, trusted by schools.
landing.features.title: Master languages naturally
landing.features.subtitle: Lingual mimics real-world immersion with AI that adapts to your level and interests.
landing.features.cards.speaking.title: Situational Speaking
landing.features.cards.speaking.desc: Practice ordering coffee, checking into a hotel, or making friends in realistic 3D scenarios.
landing.features.cards.feedback.title: Instant Feedback
landing.features.cards.feedback.desc: Get immediate corrections on pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary without the embarrassment.
landing.features.cards.adaptive.title: Adaptive Conversations
landing.features.cards.adaptive.desc: The AI remembers your conversations and adjusts difficulty as you improve over time.
landing.how.title: How Lingual works
landing.how.steps.choose.title: Choose a Scenario
landing.how.steps.choose.desc: Select from real-world situations or create your own.
landing.how.steps.speak.title: Speak Naturally
landing.how.steps.speak.desc: Use your voice to interact with AI characters. No typing required.
landing.how.steps.feedback.title: Get Feedback
landing.how.steps.feedback.desc: Review your conversation with highlighted improvements.
landing.how.steps.improve.title: Improve Fast
landing.how.steps.improve.desc: Track your progress and level up your fluency score.
landing.schools.title: Empower your language department
landing.schools.subtitle: Give your students unlimited speaking practice without increasing teacher workload. Track proficiency growth with automated grading and detailed analytics.
landing.footer.tagline: Making language learning accessible, effective, and fun for everyone through the power of AI conversation.
landing.footer.copyright: © 2026 Lingual Learning Inc. All rights reserved.
